title: Siege Choir
lore: Gym fuel stacked so high the squat rack felt like a siege tower — Sawa Node wrote every choir hit for the last set of the day.
artistPersona: Mecha-anime score producer — every build-up is a launch sequence, every choir hit is a cockpit declaration. Instrumental-first; no licensed robot likeness.
albumConcept: Sawa Node's sortie sequel — peak-hour choir hits, thruster drops, and the kind of anthem that makes a gym feel like final battle.
